* Required Fields: Warning! Enabling this feature may cause unwanted messages to be sent to people whose email addresses are being used abusively. Please make sure that you have implemented security measures before enabling (e.g. CAPTCHA, HoneySpam).
* Obligatoriske Felter: Advarsel! Aktivering af denne funktion kan medføre, at uønskede beskeder sendes til personer, hvis e-mailadresser bruges misbrug. Sørg for, at du har implementeret sikkerhedsforanstaltninger, før du aktiverer (f.eks. CAPTCHA, HoneySpam).

* Required Fields: Adds a hidden field that bots fill in, zero dependency, works everywhere.
* Obligatoriske Felter: Tilføjer et skjult felt som bots udfylder, nul afhængighed, virker overalt.

* Required Fields: Adds an invisible trap field. Submissions that fill it are silently dropped as bot traffic.
* Obligatoriske Felter: Tilføjer et usynligt fælde felt. Indsendelser, der udfylder det, bliver lydløst tabt som bot trafik.

* Required Fields: Allow headless frontends to submit contact forms via the API.
* Obligatoriske Felter: Tillad hovedløse frontends at indsende kontaktformularer via API'en.

* Required Fields: Auto-Reply Emails per Recipient per Hour
* Obligatoriske Felter: Auto-svar e-mails pr. modtager pr. time

* Required Fields: Caps how many auto-reply emails a single address can receive per hour. The merchant notification is still sent. Defeats email-bombing of third parties. 0 disables the limit.
* Obligatoriske Felter: Caps, hvor mange auto-svar e-mails en enkelt adresse kan modtage i timen. Forhandleren notifikation er stadig sendt. Beskyder email-bombning af tredjeparter. 0 deaktiverer grænsen.

* Required Fields: Invalid Form Key. Please submit your request again.
* Obligatoriske Felter: Ugyldig formularnøgle. Indsend venligst din anmodning igen.

* Required Fields: Invisible background measures (honeypot, rate limits) that blunt spam and email-bombing without inconveniencing real customers. Do not set the limits so low that legitimate visitors are blocked.
* Obligatoriske Felter: Usynlige baggrundsforanstaltninger (honeypot, sats grænser), der stumpe spam og email-bombning uden gener rigtige kunder. Sæt ikke grænserne så lav, at legitime besøgende blokeres.

* Required Fields: Per email address. Default 3 per hour. 0 to disable.
* Obligatoriske Felter: Pr. e-mail adresse. Standard 3 i timen. 0 for at deaktivere.

* Required Fields: Settings for contact-form submissions made via the REST/GraphQL API (used by headless storefronts).
* Obligatoriske Felter: Indstillinger for kontaktformularer foretaget via REST/GraphQL API (bruges af headless storefronts).

* Required Fields: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
* Obligatoriske Felter: For mange anmodninger. Vent et øjeblik og prøv igen.

* Required Fields: Unable to submit your request. Please try again later
* Obligatoriske Felter: Kan ikke indsende din anmodning. Prøv igen senere

* Required Fields: Your inquiry was submitted and will be responded to as soon as possible. Thank you for contacting us.
* Obligatoriske Felter: Din forespørgsel blev indsendt og vil blive besvaret så hurtigt som muligt. Tak fordi du kontaktede os.
